subject: Civic Education

lesson.title: Group Sorting (Card Matching)
topics: Prepare cards with different special groups (e.g., elderly, disabled, orphans, street children,
refugees) and another set of cards with their possible needs (e.g., healthcare, education,
Learners work in groups to match special groups with their corresponding needs.
